scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun run build:server && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force packages/web-server/dist/web -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path packages/web-server/dist/web -Force | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path packages/web/dist/* -Destination packages/web-server/dist/web -Recurse"
